title: Boost AI context with hybrid search in Spanner
summary: Google Cloud Spanner now combines full-text and vector search in multi-model queries for AI-powered contextual search and retrieval-augmented generation applications. The platform integrates with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform to enable sophisticated AI-powered experiences with operational data.
writeup: This video covers hybrid search in Google Cloud Spanner, which now combines full-text and vector search within multi-model queries for contextual search and retrieval-augmented generation. It matters because it brings semantic and keyword retrieval together over operational data in a single database rather than across separate systems. Key takeaways: Spanner supports both full-text and vector search in the same queries, and it integrates with the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform to build AI-powered experiences on operational data.
